inputs.label: Tebibytes (TiB)
inputs.businessContext: The data volume in tebibytes (binary prefix, 2^40 bytes).

businessContext_i18n.en: The data volume in tebibytes (binary prefix, 2^40 bytes).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tebibayt cinsinden veri hacmi (ikili önek, 2^40 bayt).
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Datenvolumen in Tebibyte (binäres Präfix, 2^40 Bytes).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le volume de données en tébioctets (préfixe binaire, 2^40 octets).
businessContext_i18n.es: El volumen de datos en tebibytes (prefijo binario, 2^40 bytes).

inputs.label: Conversion Factor (TiB to TB)
inputs.businessContext: Exact conversion factor: 1 TiB = 2^40 bytes, 1 TB = 10^12 bytes, so factor = 2^40 / 10^12 = 1.099511627776. Adjust for custom conversion if needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Exact conversion factor: 1 TiB = 2^40 bytes, 1 TB = 10^12 bytes, so factor = 2^40 / 10^12 = 1.099511627776. Adjust for custom conversion if needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesin dönüşüm faktörü: 1 TiB = 2^40 bayt, 1 TB = 10^12 bayt, dolayısıyla faktör = 2^40 / 10^12 = 1.099511627776. Gerekirse özel dönüşüm için ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Exakter Umrechnungsfaktor: 1 TiB = 2^40 Bytes, 1 TB = 10^12 Bytes, also Faktor = 2^40 / 10^12 = 1,099511627776. Bei Bedarf für benutzerdefinierte Umrechnung anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion exact : 1 TiB = 2^40 octets, 1 TB = 10^12 octets, donc facteur = 2^40 / 10^12 = 1,099511627776. Ajustez pour une conversion personnalisée si nécessaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión exacto: 1 TiB = 2^40 bytes, 1 TB = 10^12 bytes, por lo tanto factor = 2^40 / 10^12 = 1.099511627776. Ajuste para conversión personalizada si es necesario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل التحويل الدقيق: 1 TiB = 2^40 بايت، 1 TB = 10^12 بايت، لذا العامل = 2^40 / 10^12 = 1.099511627776. اضبط للتحويل المخصص إذا لزم الأمر.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the output terabytes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the output terabytes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı terabaytlarının yuvarlanacağı ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden der Ausgabe-Terabyte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir les téraoctets de sortie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear los terabytes de salida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المنازل العشرية لتقريب التيرابايت الناتج.

inputs.label: Output Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiply the converted terabytes by this factor for aggregated or scaled calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiply the converted terabytes by this factor for aggregated or scaled calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplu veya ölçekli hesaplamalar için dönüştürülen terabaytları bu faktörle çarpın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplizieren Sie die umgerechneten Terabyte mit diesem Faktor für aggregierte oder skalierte Berechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multipliez les téraoctets convertis par ce facteur pour des calculs agrégés ou mis à l'échelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplique los terabytes convertidos por este factor para cálculos agregados o escalados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اضرب التيرابايت المحولة بهذا العامل للحسابات المجمعة أو الموسعة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
